sessions.episode: Modern Family - S06E01  The Long Honeymoon
dialogues: Ay, no! I'm so sorry!
All right, in the briefest possible way, why don't you let me know what's going on?
Oh, please. They don't even know I'm here.
You might just miss it. I know I do.
No, because I love you for you.
Oh! Let me get that, husband.
I'm ready now. Let's go.
Uh, a little flashy, that extra zipper. It's like a staircase to nowhere.
Which I know sounds awful, but she loves it.
I just want to put you in a box and stick swords in you.
koreanHints: 2. 끔찍하게 들리는 거 알지만, 그녀는 그걸 좋아해.
3. 그냥 너를 상자에 넣고 칼로 찌르고 싶어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- in the briefest possible way : 가능한 한 가장 짧게, 요점만 간추려서 말할 때 쓰는 표현. in the simplest way, in the shortest way 등으로 응용 가능
- I know it sounds... but : 내 말이 ~하게 들리는 거 아는데, 라며 상대방의 예상 반응을 미리 인정하고 양보하는 뉘앙스
- let me know what's going on : 상황 설명을 요청할 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현. tell me보다 부드러운 느낌

dialogues: Well, I waited all morning again.
I didn't hear what you said.
Old people in Florida, they drive slow,
Are you out of your mind?
Now, what more proof do you want?
Actually, I was thinking of donating
a large portion of it to charity.
because you got a Cadillac?
He's never been able to afford it.
I can talk to you anymore.
koreanHints: 3. 사실 그 돈 중 상당 부분을 자선단체에 기부하려고 생각 중이었어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- Are you out of your mind? : 상대방이 비상식적이거나 무모한 행동을 할 때 쓰는 표현. "미쳤어?"보다는 "제정신이야?"에 가까운 뉘앙스
- what more proof do you want : 이미 충분한 증거가 있는데도 계속 의심할 때 쓰는 반문. 약간 답답함이나 짜증이 섞인 어조
- I was thinking of ~ing : 계획이나 의도를 부드럽게 표현할 때 쓰는 표현. 확정보다는 고려 중임을 나타냄
- a large portion of : 전체 중 상당 부분을 지칭. a lot of보다 격식있고 구체적인 느낌

dialogues: Ieaving those muffin pieces behind our shelter?
He makes problems go away.
And I think my relationship's in trouble.
I lost my job with the Yankees.
If I'm curt, then I apologize.
- What is this guy again? - They call him a cleaner.
The sanitation department won't get rid of them all.
I don't want her to think I'm one of those low-rise briefs guys...
Nobody wants to go on a three-hour bus tour...
- What's that? - Well, look.
koreanHints: 2. 내 생각에 우리 관계가 위기에 처한 것 같아.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- make something go away : 문제나 곤란한 상황을 완전히 해결하거나 없애버린다는 뉘앙스. 'solve'보다 더 깔끔하게 사라지게 한다는 느낌
- be in trouble : 위기나 곤경에 처한 상태. 관계, 일, 건강 등 다양한 상황에 쓰이는 자연스러운 표현
- If I'm curt : 말투가 무뚝뚝하거나 퉁명스러울 때 쓰는 표현. 'rude'보다 완곡하고 격식있는 사과 방식
